name: ISABELLA BANK CORP
summary: PART I . General Isabella Bank Corporation is a registered financial holding company registered under the BHC Act. The Corporation was incorporated in September 1988 under Michigan law. The Corporations wholly owned subsidiary, Isabella Bank, has 31 offices located throughout Bay, Clare, Gratiot, Isabella, Mecosta, Midland, Montcalm, and Saginaw counties. The area includes significant agricultural production, manufacturing, retail, gaming and tourism, and several colleges and universities. As us...
